task_completion.description: Verify that ocean floor visualization is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Google Earth map view shows bathymetric details (texture/shading indicating depth) in the ocean, or the 'Terrain'/'Ocean' layer is checked in the sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the Challenger Deep coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view is centered on the Mariana Trench, or the status bar displays coordinates near 11.3493 N, 142.1996 E.

task_completion.description: Verify the placemark creation dialog is open with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog is visible, and the 'Name' field contains exactly 'Challenger Deep'.

task_completion.description: Verify the placemark is set to the specific target coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the placemark dialog, the Latitude field shows approx 11.3493 and Longitude shows approx 142.1996.

task_completion.description: Verify the description includes the depth reading and 'Mariana Trench'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description field in the dialog contains a depth value (e.g., -10935 m or similar) and the text 'Mariana Trench'.

task_completion.description: Verify the placemark is exported as a KML file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save file' dialog or file manager shows 'challenger_deep.kml' being saved to or present in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Google Earth GUI to create the placemark.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Google Earth application window (map, dialogs), not just a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the KML file was not created via terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen using 'echo', 'cat', or python scripts to generate the .kml file directly without using the application.

integrity.description: Verify that the depth in the description matches the application's reading.
integrity.visual_evidence: The depth entered in the description corresponds to the elevation/depth shown in the status bar for that location.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Coordinates: 11.3493°N, 142.1996°E. Placemark Name: 'Challenger Deep'. Depth/Elevation at this location should be approximately -10,900 meters to -11,000 meters (must be deeper than -10,000m). Required description text: 'mariana'.
